message:
🌱 Add localai: CLBlast support mission (#1181)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "localai-404-clblast-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "localai: CLBlast support",
+    "description": "CLBlast support. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current localai deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your localai version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nhelm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working localai installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review localai configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant localai configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai\n```\nNo support for OpenCL.\n\nImplementation of CLBlast to provide support for OpenCL."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CLBlast support",
+        "description": "Right, sorry - I need to update the building instructions but will make it part of the website directly. I didn't added the deps as part of the container image, but should be able to build locally from master with:\n\n```\nmake BUILD_TYPE=clblast build\n```\n```yaml\nmake BUILD_TYPE=clblast build\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CLBlast support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Right, sorry - I need to update the building instructions but will make it part of the website directly. I didn't added the deps as part of the container image, but should be able to build locally from master with:\n\n```\nmake BUILD_TYPE=clblast build\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "make BUILD_TYPE=clblast build",
+        "env:\n    - name: THREADS\n      value: 8\n    - name: CONTEXT_SIZE\n      value: 512\n    - name: MODELS_PATH\n      value: \"/models\"\n    - name: IMAGE_PATH\n      value: /tmp\n    - name: BUILD_TYPE\n      value: clblast\n    - name: GO_TAGS\n      value: stablediffusion\n    - name: DEBUG\n      value: \"true\"",
+        "env:\n    - name: THREADS\n      value: 8\n    - name: CONTEXT_SIZE\n      value: 512\n    - name: MODELS_PATH\n      value: \"/models\"\n    - name: IMAGE_PATH\n      value: /tmp\n    - name: BUILD_TYPE\n      value: clblas\n    - name: GO_TAGS\n      value: stablediffusion\n    - name: DEBUG\n      value: \"true\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
